page: OVHcloud b3-128 is a general-purpose cloud server powered by the x86_64 architecture. It features 32 dedicated physical cores using AMD EPYC Milan processors running at 2.3 GHz, with one thread per core. The server is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing 4.0 GB of memory per core. Local storage consists of a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and the network interface delivers a baseline bandwidth of 8 Gbps. Virtualization is managed via the KVM hypervisor.

Benchmark results place this server in the top 25% for both single-core and multi-core CPU performance, as demonstrated by stress-ng and Geekbench scores. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, with read-only small block cached speeds reaching 4737.01 GB/sec and large block uncached write speeds at 145.9 GB/sec. Database operations and Redis SET performance are exceptionally strong, with Redis handling 74.67 million operations per second. However, single-threaded operations like gzip compression and static web serving throughput fall into the average tier.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the b3-128 offers a balanced allocation of dedicated CPU resources and high-speed NVMe storage without the overhead of a GPU. The lack of hyperthreading ensures dedicated execution pipelines for compute-heavy tasks, though it limits concurrent thread density compared to hyperthreaded alternatives. This hardware profile is highly suitable for database hosting, software compilation, Redis caching, and moderate multi-threaded data processing workloads.
description: OVHcloud b3-128 is a general-purpose cloud server built on the x86_64 architecture and powered by AMD EPYC Milan processors. It features 32 dedicated physical cores running at 2.3 GHz with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, paired with 128.0 GB of RAM and a 400 GB NVMe SSD. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, the server delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 8 Gbps. Performance benchmarks indicate strong capabilities, placing the server in the top 25% for multi-core CPU execution, memory bandwidth, and database operations, including Redis SET performance of 74.67 million operations per second. While single-threaded tasks and static web serving perform at average levels, the dedicated CPU allocation provides reliable, predictable execution. This configuration is well-suited for database management, software compilation, and multi-threaded data processing workloads.
og_description: OVHcloud b3-128 is a general-purpose server featuring 32 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan cores, 128 GB RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD, delivering strong multi-core CPU and database performance under a KVM hypervisor.
meta_description: OVHcloud b3-128 is a general-purpose server with 32 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan cores, 128 GB RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD for high-performance workloads.
tagline: A dedicated thirty-two core AMD EPYC server with high-speed NVMe storage and balanced memory for demanding database and compute workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan physical cores with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio
128 GB of system memory and a local 400 GB NVMe SSD
Strong multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth performance in the top 25%
8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth and KVM hypervisor virtualization
Optimized for database operations, Redis caching, and software compilation
